_comment: Base srt (@anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime) policy for sandboxing conformance agents. Goal: stop a model-driven agent from trashing the local checkout/machine — NOT to contain a determined adversary. The lever is WRITES: deny-by-default, the harness allows only an OS-temp scratch + the build-toolchain dirs. Reads stay open (locking $HOME fights uv/cargo/the claude CLI); a curated denyRead still blocks obvious credential stores. Network: srt mandates an allow-list, so the harness sets a generous one (model API + github for cargo git) — it's there to avoid breaking the agents, not as a security boundary. The harness fills network.allowedDomains, the macOS trust mach-lookup, and filesystem.allowWrite at spawn.
